summary: Retest after iteration 1 fixes. Verified empty-string optional date bug is fixed (frontend now coerces '' -> null, backend has Pydantic field_validator empty_to_none defense). Verified admin testids (lead-card-{id}, lead-detail, lead-status-pill) are present and admin status update flow works. Full smoke confirmed no regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: Inquiry submit() now correctly maps '' -> null. Backend LeadCreate.empty_to_none validator provides defense-in-depth. Both layers in agreement.
Minor: AdminDashboard lead list re-fetch after status update succeeds; consider toast/visual feedback (currently pill update only).
test_credentials: Admin: team@zenuratech.online / pridevacationsWTF (verified). /app/memory/test_credentials.md present and correct.
seed_data_creation: Added 1 lead via UI (TEST_UI Empty End) confirming the empty-end-date fix; status changed to 'proposed' via UI. Dashboard now shows 6 inquiries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both fixes verified end-to-end. Pytest backend_test.py has 15 tests covering experiences, stories, leads (with empty-string regression), admin auth/list/update, and concierge multi-turn. UI testids audited: inquiry-form, inquiry-{full-name,companions,occasion,destinations,budget,start-date,end-date,message,email,phone,next,back,submit,success,error}, admin-dashboard, admin-signout, admin-error, admin-empty, lead-card-{id}, lead-detail, lead-status-pill, admin-status-{new|in_review|proposed|won|closed}. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v
rca_of_the_issue: Previously: InquiryForm sent '' for empty optional dates causing Postgres 22007 error. Fix verified: frontend payload built via Object.fromEntries mapping v==='' -> null AND backend LeadCreate.empty_to_none field_validator covers preferred_travel_start/end + other optional strings. End-to-end UI submission with start date only now produces 201 + data-testid=inquiry-success.
